loginPrompt.title: Join In-Bite
loginPrompt.chatBody: Shall we say hi before entering the host’s living room? 😊
loginPrompt.bookingBody: Sign in to accept this invitation and join the journey!
loginPrompt.sharingBody: Join In-Bite to share your own 'Daily Bites' with the world.

activity.title: Activity
activity.empty: No activity yet. Likes and comments will show up here.

home.tagline: Invitation to someone else's daily life
home.greeting2: どこで会いましょうか？

explore.title: Explore
explore.noDailyBitesHint: Try clearing the city filter to see all recent posts.
explore.rewardFail: Reward failed. Please try again in a moment.
explore.rewardFailSoft: Comment posted. BITE reward could not sync — you can try again later.
explore.commentSavedLocalOnly: Saved on this device only (server sync failed or post not on server yet).
explore.noInvitationsHint: Try another city or remove the taste filter to see more hosts.
explore.guestTeaser: Log in to unlock full host details.
explore.dailyBiteDeleteConfirmBody: This cannot be undone. Delete this Daily Bite?

chat.paymentRequestBody: Payment: ₩{{amount}} bundle (1 BITE). Confirm the exact tour cost with your host in chat.
chat.paymentPickHint: Choose amount and currency, then complete securely with Stripe.
chat.giftHint: Choose how many BITE points to send with an optional note.
chat.giftPlaceholder: e.g. Thanks for the great chat today!
chat.inviteFormHint: Send an official invitation. You can add a short note.
chat.inviteFormPlaceholder: e.g. Shall we explore the neighborhood together tomorrow?
chat.systemInviteAccepted: Companion invitation accepted. You're now planning together!
chat.groupNotice: Group chat with host and guests ({{count}} people)
chat.companionInviteLine: {{name}} invited you to join as a companion!

profile.title: My Profile
profile.bioPlaceholder: Write a short bio so guests know your vibe.
profile.displayCurrencyHint: Choose how tour prices appear for you on Explore and detail screens. Hosts still set their own currency; amounts convert using live rates when needed.
profile.socialHint: If you signed up with email first, you can link KakaoTalk, Naver, or Google here anytime.
profile.noDailyBitesYet: You have not posted any Daily Bites yet.
profile.shareDailySubtitle: Create a BITE from your unique experience
profile.cropGuide: Position your face inside the circle.
profile.saveMissingSupabaseToken: Missing Supabase session. Add a Clerk JWT template named “supabase” (see AUTH_SUPABASE_SETUP.md) and sign in again.
profile.saveServerFailed: Could not sync profile to the server: {{detail}}

onboarding.tastesSubtitle: Choose what you enjoy right now. We'll personalize hosts and invitations based on your tastes.
